name: umap-learn
tagline: How-to reference for UMAP-learn: embeddings, clustering prep, supervised/semi-supervised UMAP, Parametric UMAP, AlignedUMAP.
verdict: Safe, no security red flags. Good code examples and troubleshooting coverage. Weak spots: no scope-exclusion guidance, self-contradicts on random_state ("always set" vs "leave unset"), hdbscan install unpinned, matplotlib used but never declared, and description claims DensMAP coverage the body never delivers.

highlights.summary: hdbscan is a well-known PyPI package but installed without a version pin, unlike umap-learn itself.
No 'NOT for'/out-of-scope guidance anywhere; risk of misfiring on t-SNE/PCA/other dim-reduction requests.
Contradicted at line 443: 'Leave it unset when throughput matters more than exact repeatability.'
